0.q: the activity of antioxidant enzymes and the expression of APX, SOD, and CAT in OELjPLT3 leaves increased to a higher level than those in the wild type after NaCl treatment

1.q: The LjGpx1 and LjGpx3 genes encode thioredoxin-dependent phospholipid hydroperoxidases... both LjGpxs perform major antioxidative functions in nodules, preventing lipid peroxidation and other oxidative processes.

2.q: both LjGpxs perform major antioxidative functions in nodules, preventing lipid peroxidation and other oxidative processes at different subcellular sites.
